result.stdout:
USAGE:
    sa-ost [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

EXAMPLES:
    sa-ost 
    sa-ost --help
    sa-ost connection list
    sa-ost snapshot list --repo my-repo

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help              Prints help information                        
        --no-gui            Run in interactive CLI mode without the TUI    
        --no-interactive    Disable all interactive prompts (for scripting)
        --force-tui         Force Terminal.Gui TUI even on legacy terminals
        --terminal-info     Show detected terminal capabilities and exit   
    -v, --version           Display version information                    

COMMANDS:
    connection    Manage OpenSearch connections                  
    snapshot      Manage OpenSearch snapshots                    
    cluster       Configure cluster nodes for snapshot operations

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    sa-ost [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

EXAMPLES:
    sa-ost 
    sa-ost --help
    sa-ost connection list
    sa-ost snapshot list --repo my-repo

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help              Prints help information                        
        --no-gui            Run in interactive CLI mode without the TUI    
        --no-interactive    Disable all interactive prompts (for scripting)
        --force-tui         Force Terminal.Gui TUI even on legacy terminals
        --terminal-info     Show detected terminal capabilities and exit   
    -v, --version           Display version information                    

COMMANDS:
    connection    Manage OpenSearch connections                  
    snapshot      Manage OpenSearch snapshots                    
    cluster       Configure cluster nodes for snapshot operations

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Configure cluster nodes for snapshot operations

USAGE:
    sa-ost cluster [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    configure-repo    Configure repository path on all cluster nodes (restarts  
                      services by default)                                      
    verify-nodes      Verify access to cluster node configuration files         
    list-nodes        List cluster nodes and their configuration paths

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Configure cluster nodes for snapshot operations

USAGE:
    sa-ost cluster [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    configure-repo    Configure repository path on all cluster nodes (restarts  
                      services by default)                                      
    verify-nodes      Verify access to cluster node configuration files         
    list-nodes        List cluster nodes and their configuration paths

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Configure repository path on all cluster nodes (restarts services by default)

USAGE:
    sa-ost cluster configure-repo [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                                     DEFAULT                                    
    -h, --help                                  Prints help information         
    -c, --connection <NAME>                     Connection name or ID (uses     
                                                default if not specified)       
    -p, --path <PATH>                           Repository path to configure on 
                                                all nodes (e.g., /mnt/snapshots)
        --nodes <NODES>                         Override cluster nodes          
                                                (comma-separated hostnames)     
        --no-restart                            Do not restart OpenSearch       
                                                services after configuration    
        --stop-timeout <SECONDS>     60         Timeout in seconds for stopping 
                                                services                        
        --start-timeout <SECONDS>    120        Timeout in seconds for starting 
                                                services                        
        --continue-on-failure                   Continue restarting remaining   
                                                nodes if one fails

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage OpenSearch connections

USAGE:
    sa-ost connection [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    add                   Add a new OpenSearch connection
    list                  List all saved connections     
    test                  Test a connection              
    delete <NAME>         Delete a connection            
    set-default <NAME>    Set the default connection

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage OpenSearch connections

USAGE:
    sa-ost connection [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    add                   Add a new OpenSearch connection
    list                  List all saved connections     
    test                  Test a connection              
    delete <NAME>         Delete a connection            
    set-default <NAME>    Set the default connection

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Add a new OpenSearch connection

USAGE:
    sa-ost connection add [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                             DEFAULT                                            
    -h, --help                          Prints help information                 
    -n, --name <NAME>                   Display name for the connection         
    -h, --host <HOST>                   OpenSearch host address                 
    -p, --port <PORT>        9200       OpenSearch port (default: 9200)         
    -u, --user <USERNAME>               Username for authentication             
        --default                       Set as the default connection           
        --nodes <NODES>                 Comma-separated list of cluster node    
                                        hostnames (e.g., node1,node2,node3)

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Add a new OpenSearch connection

USAGE:
    sa-ost connection add [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                             DEFAULT                                            
    -h, --help                          Prints help information                 
    -n, --name <NAME>                   Display name for the connection         
    -h, --host <HOST>                   OpenSearch host address                 
    -p, --port <PORT>        9200       OpenSearch port (default: 9200)         
    -u, --user <USERNAME>               Username for authentication             
        --default                       Set as the default connection           
        --nodes <NODES>                 Comma-separated list of cluster node    
                                        hostnames (e.g., node1,node2,node3)

    -f, --force    Skip confirmation

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage OpenSearch snapshots

USAGE:
    sa-ost snapshot [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    repos                 List snapshot repositories       
    create-repo           Create a snapshot repository     
    list                  List snapshots in a repository   
    create                Create a new snapshot            
    status <SNAPSHOT>     Get snapshot status              
    copy                  Copy snapshot files to local path
    restore <SNAPSHOT>    Restore a snapshot

    list                  List snapshots in a repository   
    create                Create a new snapshot            
    status <SNAPSHOT>     Get snapshot status              
    copy                  Copy snapshot files to local path
    restore <SNAPSHOT>    Restore a snapshot

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Copy snapshot files to local path

USAGE:
    sa-ost snapshot copy [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help             Prints help information   
    -s, --source <PATH>    Source directory path     
    -d, --dest <PATH>      Destination directory path

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Create a new snapshot

USAGE:
    sa-ost snapshot create [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                    Prints help information                       
    -c, --connection <NAME>       Connection name or ID (uses default if not    
                                  specified)                                    
        --json                    Output as JSON                                
    -r, --repo <NAME>             Repository name                               
    -n, --name <NAME>             Snapshot name                                 
    -i, --indices <PATTERN>       Index pattern to include (default: *ps-*)     
        --include-global-state    Include global cluster state                  
        --no-wait                 Don't wait for snapshot to complete

commands.payload:

    -r, --repo <NAME>             Repository name                               
    -n, --name <NAME>             Snapshot name                                 
    -i, --indices <PATTERN>       Index pattern to include (default: *ps-*)     
        --include-global-state    Include global cluster state                  
        --no-wait                 Don't wait for snapshot to complete

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Create a snapshot repository

USAGE:
    sa-ost snapshot create-repo [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -c, --connection <NAME>    Connection name or ID (uses default if not       
                               specified)                                       
        --json                 Output as JSON                                   
    -n, --name <NAME>          Repository name                                  
    -p, --path <PATH>          Repository path on the OpenSearch server         
        --no-compress          Disable compression

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Restore a snapshot

USAGE:
    sa-ost snapshot restore <SNAPSHOT> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <SNAPSHOT>    Snapshot name to restore

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                Prints help information           
    -c, --connection <NAME>                   Connection name or ID (uses       
                                              default if not specified)         
        --json                                Output as JSON                    
    -r, --repo <NAME>                         Repository name                   
    -i, --indices <PATTERN>                   Index pattern to restore (default:
                                              all)                              
        --rename-pattern <PATTERN>            Regex pattern for renaming indices
        --rename-replacement <REPLACEMENT>    Replacement string for renaming   
                                              indices                           
        --include-global-state                Include global cluster state      
        --no-wait                             Don't wait for restore to complete

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Restore a snapshot

USAGE:
    sa-ost snapshot restore <SNAPSHOT> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <SNAPSHOT>    Snapshot name to restore

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                                Prints help information           
    -c, --connection <NAME>                   Connection name or ID (uses       
                                              default if not specified)         
        --json                                Output as JSON                    
    -r, --repo <NAME>                         Repository name                   
    -i, --indices <PATTERN>                   Index pattern to restore (default:
                                              all)                              
        --rename-pattern <PATTERN>            Regex pattern for renaming indices
        --rename-replacement <REPLACEMENT>    Replacement string for renaming   
                                              indices                           
        --include-global-state                Include global cluster state      
        --no-wait                             Don't wait for restore to complete
